name: Dealer Identification of Securities for Investment

eligibility.description: The dealer must clearly identify the security in their records as being held for investment before the close of the day it was acquired and must not hold it for sale to customers thereafter.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows securities dealers to treat specific securities as capital assets rather than inventory, qualifying them for lower long-term capital gains rates.
